DECLARATION MARK D. WALSH FILED RE: INTEREST, CCP 1033(B)(2)NOTICE AND REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NEIL LY'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. $150 OF THE AMOUNT HELD BY THE SHERIFF WILL BE PAID TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE BALANCE PAID TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. $50 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE WITHHELD BY THE EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION WILL BE HEARD AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR AT LINE 17. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: elizabeth macdonald, esq., 415.922.5939, for plaintiff arrow financial services llc.
neil ly, 415.990.3955, defendant in pro per.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification: defendant neil ly's Claim Of Exemption is Granted in part. $150 of the amount held by the sheriff will be paid to the judgment creditor and the balance paid to the judgment debtor. $50 per pay period will be withheld by the earnings withholding order. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION will be heard at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 on the Law and Motion calendar at Line 17. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
